name: shopmeskills--cn-ecommerce-search
description: Search products across 8 Chinese e-commerce platforms: Taobao, Tmall, JD, PDD, 1688, AliExpress, Douyin, XHS. Zero-config — no API keys needed. Powered by Shopme unified product database. Use when the user asks to find products, get product info by URL or ID, search Chinese suppliers, or compare prices.
